heroTitle: ONDC: Building India's Digital Commerce Infrastructure
heroDesc: Among the first 20 employees at ONDC — India's DPIIT-backed national commerce protocol. Led digital programs and social-sector category growth, working across central ministries, state bodies, foundations, and network participants.

roleEvolution.para1: Joined ONDC when the team was under 20 people, initially leading Web Engagement and Programs Management reporting to the CBO. Later promoted to Lead Category Growth — Social Sector (SGI), reporting directly to the CEO.
roleEvolution.para2: The role spanned two distinct phases: first, building the foundational digital infrastructure and communications toolkit that the entire network would rely on; second, leveraging that infrastructure to drive social impact and economic inclusion at national scale.

phase1Initiatives.title: National Portal — ondc.org
phase1Initiatives.description: Built and scaled the national portal across 14 languages, serving as the single point of contact for all ONDC functions. Coined the network's official tagline: "Everyone's Commerce."

phase1Initiatives.title: ONDC Academy
phase1Initiatives.description: Created the education platform from scratch. Designed curriculum, coordinated with PwC and NCVET to secure Dual Awarding Body accreditation — empowering ONDC to offer end-to-end vocational education services. Certification was eventually made mandatory for network participation.

phase1Initiatives.title: ONDC Sahayak (WhatsApp Chatbot)
phase1Initiatives.description: Engineered a WhatsApp-based support chatbot for seller onboarding and query resolution. Scaled to serve the rapidly growing national user base autonomously.

phase1Initiatives.title: Ecosystem Adoption Tools
phase1Initiatives.description:
ONDC Seller QR Code: Launched interoperable QR codes enabling 120K+ MSMEs to create discoverable digital storefronts.
ONDC Saarthi: Designed the v1.0 developer reference app, reducing third-party integration and network onboarding time.
Play Store Apps: Launched official ONDC support applications to combat counterfeit apps and secure the network's digital footprint.

phase2Initiatives.title: Ministry Partnerships
phase2Initiatives.description: Operationalised partnerships with the Ministry of Rural Development (MoRD) and Ministry of Textiles (MoT), enabling artisans and Self-Help Groups to achieve their first-ever digital sales on a national platform. Activated listings across 15+ state and central emporiums including Central Cottage Industries Emporium, TRIFED (Tribes India), IndiaHandmade, and eSaras.
phase2Initiatives.description2: Presented ONDC to all State Rural Livelihood Missions (SRLMs) for adoption across states. Coordinated with AP-MEPMA and SERP for rural e-commerce rollout in Andhra Pradesh.

phase2Initiatives.title: Social Sector Growth
phase2Initiatives.description: Architected and executed targeted growth sprints delivering sustained month-over-month GMV growth in the social impact sector for six consecutive months. Authored the Supply Playbook addressing operational inefficiencies for rural and first-time sellers — reversing sector de-growth by systematically improving catalogue quality, fulfilment rates, and seller readiness.

phase2Initiatives.title: Verifiable Credentials (BMGF-funded)
phase2Initiatives.description: Supported the Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation-funded initiative to enhance seller trust and verification on the network. Increased adoption of verifiable credentials (GI Tag, Women-Owned, Organic) and scaled credentialed sellers significantly.

phase2Initiatives.title: AP Women's Day Campaign — Guinness World Record
phase2Initiatives.description: Facilitated the Andhra Pradesh Women's Day campaign in collaboration with state government bodies, generating 3 lakh orders worth ₹5.13 crore in just one week for women entrepreneurs. The campaign set an official Guinness World Record for most users in an e-business video lesson.

comms.para1: Created the first ONDC adaptable communications — Story Books, Onboarding Flyers — for network participants, sellers, and government ministries to explain the complex concept of an open network. Led comms for high-profile events including Startup Mahakumbh, G20 Summit, and Bharat Tex.
comms.para2: Spearheaded the launch of the Media & Entertainment domain on the ONDC network, creating a strategic integration pipeline of 13+ organisations including HT Media, Times Network, and Nazara.

caseStudies.title: Assisted e-commerce and ONDC: A new revenue source for BC Agents in India
Making ONDC accessible for women-led small enterprises
